Our Story

Where Tradition Meets Stone

Aurora Living Designs was born from a deep respect for classical craftsmanship. Every medallion, fountain, and sculpture is cast and finished by hand in our Lahore workshop.

We work with architects, interior designers, and homeowners who understand that some things cannot be mass-produced.

01

Hand Molding

Each form sculpted by artisans using traditional techniques.

02

Precision Casting

Premium concrete mix poured into custom molds and cured.

03

Hand Finishing

Each surface hand-sanded and sealed for a refined result.

Client Stories

What Our Clients Say

"
★★★★★

The ceiling medallion they crafted for our drawing room is nothing short of extraordinary. The detail work is museum-quality. Our architect was speechless.

Zara Mahmood
Defence Housing Authority, Lahore
"
★★★★★

We ordered a custom fountain for our corporate lobby. The craftsmanship, the finish, the delivery — everything was flawless. Worth every rupee.

Bilal Chaudhry
Gulberg III, Lahore
"
★★★★★

Working with Aurora on our boutique hotel project was a pleasure. They understood the aesthetic immediately and delivered pieces that elevated every space.

Nadia Khawaja
Interior Designer, Karachi
